title: Developing a hermes agent to turn a profit (change log)
author: getstonkzilla
selftext:
**Original post**: [https://www.reddit.com/r/ai\_trading/comments/1t0rghe/developing\_a\_hermes\_agent\_to\_turn\_a\_profit/](https://www.reddit.com/r/ai_trading/comments/1t0rghe/developing_a_hermes_agent_to_turn_a_profit/)

**TLDR**: Updates I make with TARS only - created a separate thread in order to track by date

**Change log**

|Date|Change|Why|
|:-|:-|:-|
|2026-05-05|Fixed ALLE showing no support level|Price dropped below the support it was bought at — system couldn't find a new one and went blind to downside risk|
|2026-05-05|System now remembers what support a stock was bought at|Previously it only checked current support — if that broke, it lost track of what level the trade was based on|
|2026-05-05|Closed positions no longer show up in daily health check|Old DLTR position (sold and re-bought) was showing as a duplicate|
|2026-05-05|Fractional shares now allowed for expensive stocks|DPZ at $330 was rejected because the bot thought it couldn't buy less than 1 share - it can|

**I'll post the changes here as they occur.** Tear it apart. Offer suggestions.
